v3_pipeline.feature_columns: 29-dim: 6 band energies + 4 timbre (centroid/bandwidth/rolloff/dynamic_complexity) + 3 rhythm + 12 key + 3 scale + 1 duration
v3_pipeline.col_8_identity: spectral_rolloff (frequency below which 85% of spectral energy falls)

resonator_pipeline.gradient_direction: DECREASING (peaks Z3=3728, declines to Z9=2533; bell/hump shape)

cross_modal_assessment.gradient_comparison: V3: INCREASING, Resonator: DECREASING — structurally INVERTED
cross_modal_assessment.regime_separation: ~1.0 kHz gap between V3 max and resonator min
cross_modal_assessment.amplitude_normalization_impact: NONE — spectral features are amplitude-independent in librosa
cross_modal_assessment.cross_modal_classification: IMPOSSIBLE without domain adaptation — inverted gradients + non-overlapping spectral regimes + different feature dimensions (29 vs 44)

foom_cycles.experiment: Non-triple DR=7 test — isolate whether DR=7 or triple-repetition drives negative entropy
foom_cycles.result: TRIPLE REPETITION is the necessary condition, NOT DR=7
